Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Building a Procedural Hex Map with Wave Function Collapse 367 upvotes, 52 comments
  2. Fixfest is a global gathering of repairers, tinkerers, and activists 136 upvotes, 16 comments
  3. Algebraic topology: knots links and braids 66 upvotes, 7 comments
  4. Sir Tony Hoare has died 202 upvotes, 49 comments
  5. An opinionated take on how to do important research that matters 71 upvotes, 15 comments
  6. JSLinux Now Supports x86_64 227 upvotes, 63 comments
  7. FontCrafter: Turn your handwriting into a real font 417 upvotes, 133 comments
  8. The first airplane fatality 43 upvotes, 10 comments
  9. Show HN: Remotely use my guitar tuner 19 upvotes, 4 comments
  10. Reverse-engineering the UniFi inform protocol 135 upvotes, 59 comments
  11. So you want to write an “app” (2025) 38 upvotes, 12 comments
  12. Notes on Baking at the South Pole 28 upvotes, 8 comments
  13. Oracle is building yesterday's data centers with tomorrow's debt 173 upvotes, 82 comments
  14. Rethinking Syntax: Binding by Adjacency 40 upvotes, 15 comments
  15. Show HN: The Mog Programming Language 111 upvotes, 55 comments
  16. Ireland shuts last coal plant, becomes 15th coal-free country in Europe (2025) 842 upvotes, 516 comments
  17. Flash media longevity testing – 6 years later 127 upvotes, 69 comments
  18. Velxio, Arduino Emulator 39 upvotes, 16 comments
  19. Durdraw – ANSI art editor for Unix-like systems 35 upvotes, 14 comments
  20. Restoring a Sun SPARCstation IPX part 1: PSU and NVRAM (2020) 89 upvotes, 48 comments
  21. Jolla on track to ship new phone with Sailfish OS, user-replaceable battery 181 upvotes, 117 comments
  22. Launch HN: Terminal Use (YC W26) – Vercel for filesystem-based agents 78 upvotes, 54 comments
  23. What I Always Wanted to Know about Second Class Values 29 upvotes, 16 comments
  24. Bluesky CEO Jay Graber is stepping down 279 upvotes, 240 comments
  25. DARPA’s new X-76 142 upvotes, 142 comments
  26. Is legal the same as legitimate: AI reimplementation and the erosion of copyleft 309 upvotes, 347 comments
  27. Show HN: DenchClaw – Local CRM on Top of OpenClaw 81 upvotes, 81 comments
  28. Rendezvous with Rama 81 upvotes, 87 comments
  29. No leap second will be introduced at the end of June 2026 67 upvotes, 78 comments
  30. Florida judge rules red light camera tickets are unconstitutional 289 upvotes, 422 comments

Last generated 8:30am, 10 March 2026. Source here.
